summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Polymarket Edge OS Phase 1. All 18 specified requirements tested successfully. Fixed critical kill switch bug that was allowing orders through when kill switch was active.

critical_bugs_fixed.issue: Kill switch was not blocking paper orders when active
critical_bugs_fixed.impact: Orders could bypass risk controls when kill switch was enabled
critical_bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Added kill switch check and risk engine validation before order submission

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns engine status and mode
GET /api/status returns full engine state snapshot
GET /api/config returns trading_mode, risk config, strategies, credentials_present
PUT /api/config with trading_mode='live' without credentials returns 400
POST /api/test/paper-order submits order through full pipeline
Kill switch blocks paper orders when active (FIXED)
GET /api/trades returns trade records after paper order
GET /api/positions returns position state after paper order
GET /api/orders returns order records after paper order
